items.name: Sword of Glowing Hope
items.description: Even in the deepest darkness, there is hope in the flash of my blade. This sword is lit up so it's bright in dark places and slightly glows. Slash at your enemies dealing 17 damage per hit. Upon slashing enemies, sparks emit out of the sword. Anybody killed will burst into neon green flame particles and vanish.

items.name: Holdable Rainbow Dual-Bladed Laser Sword (TOP)
items.description:
Bottom piece: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/15554049210

Each dual bladed sword has a top and bottom piece due to UGC limitations. They will join at the hilt seamlessly when equipped.

All colours for single and double bladed swords are available in my Maxxell group or the following link: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=laser&Category=1&CreatorName=Maxxell&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

Holdable swords fit best with block bodies, 90%-100% scaling.

items.name: Y2K Gyaru DC Rhinestone Pink Leopard McBling Belt
items.description:
𝕄𝕒𝕟𝕪 𝕠𝕥𝕙𝕖𝕣 𝕣𝕖𝕔𝕠𝕝𝕠𝕣𝕤 𝕒𝕣𝕖 𝕒𝕧𝕒𝕚𝕝𝕒𝕓𝕝𝕖 𝕚𝕟 𝕞𝕪 𝕘𝕣𝕠𝕦𝕡!
Join Group = https://www.roblox.com/communities/14477611

Embrace your gyaru style with this bold cheetah print leopard belt, featuring stunning light pink, silver, and white rhinestones and studded gems. Perfectly capturing the essence of Y2K McBling, this belt brings a mix of cute, luxury, and edge to your look. Whether you're channeling that iconic 2000s vibe or adding a fun pop to your outfit, this accessory is a must-have for any gyaru trendsetter looking to make a statement with vintage glam. Shine bright and rock your McBling style with confidence!
